scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && npm install && npx prisma migrate deploy && node src/index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
